problem id: 75cd54d8
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  00001001 -> 01000000
  10111001 -> 01001011
  10011110 -> 10001001
  01011100 -> 00000101
  01101101 -> 01000110
  10101110 -> 10001010
  11111000 -> 00001111
  01100010 -> 10000110
  01110011 -> 11000111

query: 01000110
predicted answer: 10000100
